reasoning: Start by increasing A to observe if Y changes in relation to A.
Since increasing A did not change Y, I will now try to increase B to see if there is a relationship between B and Y.

Y has increased from 90.0 to 180.0 when B was increased from 10.0 to 20.0, suggesting a direct relationship between B and Y. No change in Y when A was increased indicates A does not directly affect Y. Given the significant change in Y with B, it suggests Y might be proportional to B squared, as this would explain the doubling of Y with a tenfold increase in B.
